dashboard.title: Brand Semantic Website OS
dashboard.subtitle: SaaS Platform for AEO & AI Search Answer Optimization
dashboard.seed_desc: Populate local DB with stable seed data representing our three MVP domains (PureBarrier, Quick25, Lumiere Hall).
dashboard.kbeauty_desc: Trust-focused claims and YMYL sensitive skincare AI answer trace loop.
dashboard.convenience_desc: Menu combo locator and local-business intent mapping trace loop.
dashboard.wedding_desc: Complex packaging contract integrity and wedding vendor comparison trace loop.
dashboard.guardrails_desc1_text: Every data item generated in this lab is strictly tagged with workspace_id. PostgreSQL Row-Level Security ensures that even high-performance query tools cannot leak tenant boundaries.
dashboard.guardrails_desc2_text: Your active role is owner. Mutative actions (such as publishing brand truths or creating patches) will verify role permission matrices using backend-validated session signatures.

observatory.title: AI Answer Observatory
observatory.subtitle: Real-time AI search answer visibility and metric analytics

kculture.studio_subtitle: A MeaningOps module that extracts cultural concept tensors based on TCO, evaluates global resonance, and uncovers commercial, tourism, and creative transfer opportunities.
kculture.harness_desc: Evaluates the AI response space in real-time using a 6-dimensional judgment pipeline (extraction, fidelity, distortion, hallucination, risk, policy) against the standard QBS question set of the selected domain pack.
kculture.opps_empty: Run observations to let the Opportunity Engine automatically generate K-Content, K-Tourism, and K-Product opportunities.
kculture.active_check_desc: Load the 3 national standard domain packs (K-Beauty, K-Food, K-Tourism) and 90+ canonical cultural concepts to begin your analysis.

attractor.title: Cultural Attractor Map
attractor.subtitle: Force-directed visualization of the loaded K-Culture concept network

semantic_core.studio_desc: Model search intent, structure canonical questions, map operational concepts, and verify claim lineages.
semantic_core.architecture_desc: BSW-OS enforces strict boundaries between strategic, normalized, and contextual layers. We do not collapse these definitions.
semantic_core.layer1_desc: Strategic search territories that represent what search spaces your brand must legally own.
semantic_core.layer2_desc: Stable, normalized question signatures that act as unique identities for query deduplication.
semantic_core.layer3_desc: Dynamic scene templates holding intent models and specific context scopes evaluated by AI engines.
semantic_core.signals_desc: Mine organic user search keywords and evaluate query volume lists.
semantic_core.capital_desc: Map strategic hierarchical territories and configure weights.
semantic_core.qis_desc: Configure dynamic scenario templates and risk levels.
semantic_core.concepts_desc: Concepts are first-class operational dictionary schemas containing formal definitions, not simple keyword labels.
semantic_core.kg_desc: Map multi-tenant graph nodes and edges to mathematically represent the brand knowledge model.
semantic_core.claims_desc: Trace claim integrity through verified clinical evidence and safe disclosures to generate cryptographic lineage seals.
semantic_core.dedup_desc: By grouping organic query signals under a unique Canonical Question Signature, BSW-OS avoids duplicating content assets and maps intent contexts in a single, stable location.
semantic_core.concepts_operational_dictionaries_desc: Rather than treating concept terms as simple content tags, BSW-OS models **TCO Concepts** as first-class schemas. This ensures AI generators do not invent terms and strictly conform to brand definitions.
semantic_core.kg_ai_extractor_desc: Provide a target seed concept to let our AI agent automatically define concept attributes and connect related graph nodes.
semantic_core.kg_ontology_paths_desc: By mathematically representing the brand's knowledge structure, BSW-OS provides the logical structure necessary for advanced SEO query resolution engines.
semantic_core.claims_safety_gates_desc: Publishing critical factual claims without verified clinical evidence and active boundary disclosure rules is strictly blocked by the system core gate. Satisfying these trace links generates a cryptographic seal verification signature.
